## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the transition from web stack to lightbox for development work and the plan for ramping down the engagement with web stack.](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Decision to ramp down engagement with web stack over the next month due to lack of proactiveness and perceived low productivity](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Plan to keep one work stream open with web stack for a transition month while onboarding lightbox](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Lightbox to provide a full-time developer, designer, PM, and QA resources at \~$16k/month](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Need for web stack to provide comprehensive documentation and knowledge transfer to lightbox](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

## Topics

### Web Stack Engagement

  - [Paying $18k/month but feeling underutilized and lack of proactiveness from web stack](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Difficulty tracking hours worked by web stack](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Decision to ramp down over next month rather than abrupt cancellation](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Lightbox Onboarding

  - [Bringing on lightbox for full-time dev, design, PM, QA at \~$16k/month](https://fathom.video/share/hgbCFZxXTHpqFpMJd4ssSsZjC5tu8iAz?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
